# BROKEN FIXTURE — deliberately exceeds 100-line cap to verify audit catches it

## Project

Intentionally broken fixture.

## Purpose

This fixture exists to verify that audit-setup.sh correctly catches CLAUDE.md
files that exceed the 100-line hard cap (200+ lines triggers ERR exit code 2).

## Technology Stack

No real stack — this is a test fixture only.
